api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.title: Class BlinkBehavior | Floating Text API
api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.summary: Class BlinkBehavior This behavior causes the text to turn on and off simulating a blink. It takes a blink speed and a total duration. Inheritance object IFloatingBehavior BlinkBehavior Inherited Members IFloatingBehavior.owner IFloatingBehavior.Wait() IFloatingBehavior.DelayFor(float) IFloatingBehavior.DoWaitForDelay(float) IFloatingBehavior.IsFinished IFloatingBehavior.WaitForFinish IFloatingBehavior.IsPersistentBehavior object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Namespace: BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Behaviors Assembly: FloatingTextEngine.dll Syntax public class BlinkBehavior : IFloatingBehavior Constructors BlinkBehavior(float, float) Initializes a new instance of the BlinkBehavior class. api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.title: Class FloatingBehaviorEngine | Floating Text API
api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.summary: Class FloatingBehaviorEngine This class handles all the behaviors each spawned floating text object has. It will update all behaviors and remove them when finished until no more behaviors are left. This class also handles the objects return to the object pool. Inheritance object FloatingBehaviorEngine Namespace: BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Behaviors Assembly: FloatingTextEngine.dll Syntax public class FloatingBehaviorEngine : MonoBehaviour Constructors FloatingBehaviorEngine() Declaration public FloatingBehaviorEngine() Methods UpdateModifiers(float) Updates the modifier list that hold persistent behaviors that are not constrained by finishing. Declaration public void UpdateModifiers(float deltaTime) Parameters Type Name Description float deltaTime Delta Time With(IFloatingBehavior) Adds a new behavior. Declaration public FloatingBehaviorEngine With(IFloatingBehavior newBehavior) Parameters Type Name Description IFloatingBehavior newBehavior The new behavior. Returns Type Description FloatingBehaviorEngine WithPreset(List<IFloatingBehavior>) Adds a new preset from the FloatingPresets class. Declaration public FloatingBehaviorEngine WithPreset(List<IFloatingBehavior> preset) Parameters Type Name Description List<IFloatingBehavior> preset The preset. Returns Type Description FloatingBehaviorEngine See Also UnityEngine.MonoBehaviour

api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.summary: Class IFloatingBehavior Interface class for all floating text behaviors. Implement this class to define new behavior components. Declaration public bool IsFinished { get; protected set; } Property Value Type Description bool true if this instance is finished; otherwise, false. IsPersistentBehavior Defines if this behavior has a "finish" condition or if it just lasts for the entirety of the behavior list. Declaration public abstract void UpdateBehavior(float dt) Parameters Type Name Description float dt The deltatime. Wait() Marks this behavior as a wait behavior. Any behaviors following this one will have to wait before it finishes for them to start. Declaration public IFloatingBehavior Wait() Returns Type Description IFloatingBehavior

api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.title: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Behaviors | Floating Text API
api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.summary: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Behaviors Classes BillboardBehavior This behavior causes text to billboard towards camera based on provided mode. BlinkBehavior This behavior causes the text to turn on and off simulating a blink. It takes a blink speed and a total duration. ChangeFontSizeBehavior This behavior will set this floating texts specific size. This is a substitute for changing the global size through the FloatingTextEngine inspector window. ColorGradientBehavior This behavior will take 2 colors and lerp between them. ExpandShrinkBehavior This behavior will scale up and then down for the specified amount of times. FadeInOutBehavior This behavior will fade in and fade out at the specified speed (seconds for full cycle) over time. FadeOutBehavior This behavior will fade out the text over the specified duration. FloatingBehaviorEngine This class handles all the behaviors each spawned floating text object has. It will update all behaviors and remove them when finished until no more behaviors are left. This class also handles the objects return to the object pool. FloatingTextBehaviors This wrapper class hides the "new" calls for each behavior. This needs to be updated when a new behavior is implemented. Pass these methods into the .With() function from the FloatingBehaviorEngine class. IFloatingBehavior Interface class for all floating text behaviors. Implement this class to define new behavior components. MoveUpArc2DBehavior This behavior moves up and in an arc. The arc is determined by the random x value within the "arcSpread" value. MoveUpArc3DBehavior This behavior causes text to move up and arc in 3D world space. MoveUpBehavior This behavior moves up in the Y axis. MoveUpExpandBehavior This behavior moves up in the Y axis then expands after movement has finished. PopBehavior This behavior scales up quickly and then slowly scales down over time. ScaleToBehavior This behavior scales to the value passed in. Shake2DBehavior This behavior will cause the floating text to shake for a specified duration. Shake3DBehavior This behavior causes text to shake in 3D space. Does not alter z axis of position. ShakeX2DBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to shake along the x axis. ShakeX3DBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to shake along the x axis. WobbleBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to rotate back and forth on the z axis. Enums EBillboardType Enum that determines billboard behavior.
